data.body:
[0.5-Year Anniversary Festival Celebration Special Gift]

Sensei! To show our gratitude, Schale's sent you a Gift Set in celebration of our 0.5-Year Anniversary, so check your in-game mailbox!
(Available until 05/22/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))

https://nexon.link/9mM
#BlueArchive
